sample_requests: Build a consensus label from scsa_annotation + gpt_celltype + gbi_celltype on PBMC3k via local-majority arbitration (offline)
Run online CellVote with gpt-4o-mini on a 20-cluster cohort and report the cost
Diagnose why CellVote keeps returning 'unknown' for a cluster - markers don't match candidates
Run all three annotators (cv.scsa_anno() / cv.gpt_anno() / cv.gbi_anno()) then cv.vote() for one-shot pipeline
Compare offline (local-majority) and online (LLM) consensus on the same AnnData

validation_budget.skip_reason: Source-grounded via inspect.signature / inspect.getdoc and direct reads of omicverse/single/_cellvote.py. The offline local-majority arbitration is a deterministic test runnable in any CI env without LLM credentials; not executed here.
